/-!
# Longest Common Subsequence (LCS)

This module implements the Longest Common Subsequence algorithm for strings.

## Overview
The LCS problem finds the longest subsequence common to two sequences. A subsequence
is a sequence that appears in the same relative order but not necessarily contiguous.

## Edge Cases
- Empty inputs yield empty LCS
- Non-string inputs are invalid (in Python this would raise ValueError)

## Implementation
Uses dynamic programming with a 2D table approach.
-/
